## Describe the bug
Weight props aren't applying style to Text component.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. See the first example of the [Text component page](https://docs.once-ui.com/once-ui/components/text) in the docs. The third line has these props `size="s" weight="strong"` b
test_description_zh: 在页面中使用 Text 组件，设置 size="s" weight="strong" 等不同 weight 属性，观察文本的字重样式是否正确渲染。
expected_result_zh: Text 组件应根据传入的 weight 属性（如 strong、default 等）正确应用对应的 CSS font-weight 样式，文本在视觉上呈现出相应的粗细变化。
